SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Set For Trial On Mar-06-19 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 608

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Continued To Mar-06-19 At 09:15 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-07-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ilana G. Zelener, Esq., appeared on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Equifax, Inc.
Andrew Julian Schran Respondent/Plaintiff appeared in pro per.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Respondent/Plaintiff Andrew Julian Schran testifies on his own behalf.
Ms. Zelener testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Equifax, Inc.
Witness for Appellant/Defendant Nadia Reynaga-Moreno testifies.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Respondent/Plaintiff's Group Exhibit 1: Blue folder containing documents including Declaration of Plaintiff, receipt for LifeLock purchase; Opinion and Order in re Equifax, Inc. Customer Data Security Breach Litigation.
Defendant/Appellant's Group Exhibit A: Copy of Civil Code 1798.82.
Respondent/Plaintiff's and Appellant/Defendant's exhibits are retained by the Court.

The Plaintiff/Respondent asks for $1338 in lost earnings.

The matter is taken under submission.
Dept. 608; Judge: Joseph Quinn; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.
